div.head:
No. 17.
Mr. Lee to Mr. Bayard.

opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States,
Vienna, March 1, 1887. (Received March 16.)

div.p: Sir: Referring to my No. 211, dated October 4, 1886, on the subject of the order of expulsion directed against Mr. Antonio Chirighin, a naturalized citizen of the United States of Austro-Hungarian birth, I have the honor to report that my action in the case as therein reported has resulted in the rescinding of the said order of expulsion.
I have informed Mr. Chirighin of the result and cautioned him to be very prudent in his conduct, as I believed it would not be possible to secure a like result a second time in the same case.
